PackList.title: Nurse
positive_prompts:
Core Subject:

A high-quality 3D digital illustration in a stylized, Pixar-inspired animation aesthetic. The central figure is a vibrant, young Black female nurse with a warm, joyful expression, winking at the camera. She has voluminous, tight red-auburn curls styled in a short afro. She is sitting cross-legged in a meditative lotus pose on a plush, cream-colored circular rug.

Attire & Accessories:

She wears teal-colored medical scrubs over a black long-sleeve undershirt. A black stethoscope is draped around her neck, featuring a small red heart charm. She wears large, circular dangle earrings with a horizontal striped pattern in earth tones, wooden prayer bead bracelets on both wrists, and blue sneakers with white laces. Two ID badges are clipped to her scrubs: one featuring a small photo and another with a red heart icon.

Pose & Props:

Her right hand is raised in a "Gyan Mudra" (OK gesture), while her left hand holds a glowing, stylized red 3D heart with a golden EKG pulse line running through it. A similar glowing heart floats in the air to her right.

Environment & Background:

The setting is a cozy, sunlit room blending a medical office with a meditation space. In the background, a serene Buddha statue sits next to a burning white candle and purple crystals. To the right, a whiteboard displays colorful EKG heart rate graphs. A laptop on the floor also shows a heart rhythm. A glowing lotus flower icon floats near a window that looks out onto lush green trees under a bright blue sky.

Lighting & Atmosphere:

The atmosphere is peaceful, energetic, and zen. The lighting is warm and cinematic, with soft golden bokeh light particles floating throughout the air. Colors are highly saturated, with a focus on teal, vibrant red, and warm wood tones.
